case_title: ROLANDO CAMAAL VS. GROUPO RISTORANTE ITALIANO INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMAAL, ROLANDO AS TO DEFENDANT GROUPO RISTORANTE ITALIANO INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ALLEGRO ROMANO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
